game.short_text: A daughter visits her deceased mother to pay respects. They share a hidden past that’s about to come out of the grave.
game.title: My Mother & Me

details.title: My Mother & Me
details.description:
About the game

After ten long years, a daughter visits her deceased mother to pay her respects. They share a long hidden past that’s about to come out of the grave.



This game includes depictions of but does not condone the following: domestic violence, depression, suicide, and transphobia.

I used to love making short narrative ZZT games, so my first ever jam submission was made in that style! This is for the Adventure Jam 2023: https://itch.io/jam/advjam2023

How to play

This game was made in RPG Maker MV, and uses the default controls from that engine. Controller, mouse, and keyboard are supported.
Esc opens the menu
F4 toggles fullscreen
F5 restarts the game.


Any feedback is appreciated! For windows, download and unzip the  MOMwin.zip file and run the game.exe file.
For mac, download and unzip the MOMmac.zip file. The game file can be run from any location on your computer, but for full options and save functionality it must be placed in your applications folder.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(2 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: JOS87
moreInfo.Tags: drama, LGBT, Short, Singleplayer, Story Rich

details.title: Perturbation
details.description:
Perturbation:  anxiety; mental uneasiness.
Warning: Contains references to mental health illnesses
Perturbation is a short, immersive 3D first-person adventure game, made in two weeks for the Adventure Game Jam 2023. It offers players a glimpse into the world of anxiety. The game's primary focus is to create a heightened sense of empathy and understanding surrounding the challenges individuals face when dealing with anxiety. The game aims to capture the essence of anxiety through atmospheric exploration and subtle gameplay mechanics, providing players with a meaningful experience.
- To play the experience,  Unzip the downloaded zip file and run AGJ.exe
Controls:
Movement: WASD
Interact: E
Credits:
- Jevan Dean: Project Manager, Designer, Programmer
- A Model Kit: Sound Designer/Composer
-Autif Kamal (MrGold) Programmer

Assets used:
https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/3d/props/furniture/furniture-free-pack-192...

Thank you for playing!

Known Issues:
-When launching the game, the window may not be focused. All you need to do is press the windows key then click or ALT Tab to the correct window.
-To exit, use the windows key and fine the icon and close the game. You can also use Alt f4. 
- You Interact with notes by hovering over a note and pressing E. To close the note, hover over the note again and press E.

moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Atmospheric, First-Person, Horror, Indie, Short, Singleplayer

game.short_text: After 200 years of sleep, it's time to help your vampire master to conquer humanity.
game.title: No Rest for the Wicked

details.title: No Rest for the Wicked
details.description:
Inside a manor frozen in time, a vampire patiently waits for the right moment to rise again. The time has come, and it's up to you - his not so faithful servant - to help him make the spell that will bring humanity to an end.This is a point and click game. Use your mouse to control the character.
Left click: walk to, or perform action indicated by the cursor icon (take, talk, look, use)Right click: look at hotspotInventory: left click to use, right click to look. Right click with a selected object will deselect it.
Note on video: the game will start full screen. You can change to windowed in the options. When you do, the window will be 960x540, but if you select free cursor you can resize it freely.
Note on text: the game will start with both voice and subtitles, and the text will auto-advance. If you wish the game to wait for your input to go on, you have to disable voice in the options selecting text only, wait for click.
Made in 14 days for Adventure Jam 2023Fabio "Guga" GuggeriWriting, design, programming, character art, background art, music.
Voice cast:David Howlett as The ServantDavid Nagel as The MasterJD Kelly as OttoSally Beaumont as CarlaShaun Mendum as NeilPaul Thomas as GaryMichael Forward as the narrator
Translators:Fabio "Guga" Guggeri - ItalianNiccolò Romero-Passerin - FrenchRamón Wilhelm - GermanAlodia Lozano - Spanish
Special thanks to:Ilaria and Alice Guggeri for their inspiration on setting, plot, puzzles and musicPaolo "StickGrinder" Pustorino, Fabio "Zak Phoenix McKracken" Belli, Maurizio "Seguso" Colucci, Dario "drbb" Rudoni for testing, proofreading and feedback.
Made with PowerQuest by Powerhoof.

game.short_text: Point and click satirical adventure set during the cold war in a soviet bunker - 5th place Adventure Game Jam 2023
game.title: D3AD HAND - Jam Version

details.title: D3AD HAND - Jam Version
details.description:
"If you like the Jam version please consider buying the extended version here or on Steam. Thanks."STORY
Yuri Spraytyvich has been selected for the role of Junior Strategic Missile Force Manager of Čerëmuški Command Post in Chita, Siberia. 

His new position comes with a lot of responsabilities and he will need to deal with lack of maintenance, worker strikes, radioactive materials and PERIMETER, the automatic defence system. 
When PERIMETER receives by mistake the order to start the launch of the ballistic missile, it is up to Yuri to fix the problem and save the world from nuclear apocalypse. 
D3AD HAND is a satirical graphic adventure inspired by LucasArts golden age videogames like Monkey Island and the Indiana Jones series. 
DISCLAIMER: The game does NOT support WAR in any form or shape, quite the contrary. 
CONTROLS
Main ActionLeft Mouse ButtonSecondary Action (when available)Right Mouse ButtonExamine  Talk to UsePick upGo to 
INVENTORY
Show Inventory Mouse over on the top of the screenUse Inventory ItemsLeft Mouse ButtonExamine Inventory ItemRight Mouse Button
SAVE GAME
Note that you cannot save the game during cut scenes or dialogues. But the game will create an AUTOSAVE file when you will enter a room where an automatic cutscene or dialogue will start.
Powered by: Unity Adventure Creator
Pixel Art and Development: Duck Made Of Wood
Dialogues edited by: Fleur Doidge
Freeware music from: 
melodyayresgriffiths
https://pixabay.com/users/melodyayresgriffiths-27269767/?tab=audio
Soundtrack:
https://pixabay.com/it/music/gente-the-devil-dances-in-moscow-putin-russia-disco-instrumental-russian-142457/
https://pixabay.com/it/music/gente-russian-folk-kalinka-108671/

https://pixabay.com/it/music/gente-russian-fun-109091/

https://pixabay.com/it/music/video-giochi-rasputin-russia-tetris-game-cossack-pu...
https://www.silvermansound.com/free-music/soviet-march
ITALIAN LOCALISATION
Seleziona "Options" nel menù dei titoli o premendo ESC durante il gioco. Clicca su "Language: English" per passare alla lingua italiana.

game.short_text: A point-and-click adventure game.
game.title: EVA

details.title: EVA
details.description:
Introduction
EVA is a point-and-click suspense adventure game about a mystery in a hospital.
You wake up somewhere in the hospital without remembering anything. You are going to find out who you are, what you do by exploring the hospital. But at the same time, a greater secret slowly unveils...
How to play
Left-click on the ground to move your character around.Left-click on an object to interact or pick it up.Right-click on an object to inspect it.
Credits
Art, Code, Design, Story: VQSHR, OtakuZhangAudio: Old City Theme by remaxim licensed CC-BY-SA 3.0Rise of Spirit by Alexandr Zhelanov licensed CC-BY 3.0Art:Hospital TopDown perspective 2D pixel art by Rodrimanu360 licensed CC-BY 4.0Cartoon Detective Pack by hugues labordeWarped Sci-Fi Lab by ansimuz
EVA was created using PowerQuest for Unity by Powerhoof for Adventure Jam 2023.


    Change Log
    06/10/2023-v1.0.1(Bug Fix): Fixed an issue that would cause a button disappear after certain operation. Fixed an issue that would cause an inventory item unusable. 

Please rate and leave a comment if you enjoyed the game! We appreciate any feedbacks too!

game.short_text: Face your past as a citizen under observation and find out who broke your trust
game.title: Subject Of Observation

details.title: Subject Of Observation
details.description:
Welcome to "Subject Of Observation," an atmospheric pixel-art adventure that takes you on an introspective journey into a woman's haunting past.
After the fall of the "great nation", it became known that its citizens were spied on by their own government. For this, informal collaborators spied on their neighbours, friends, and even family members. Now, several years later, Erika Mustermann decides to face her past as a citizen of a dictatorship. As a SUBJECT OF OBSERVATION.
As Erika reads her files, she remembers the past. Help her to piece together who spied on her and broke her trust.
How to play:
In general it's always a good idea to click on anything blinking.
Read the text of each file, then click on the underlined text. Make sure to click on EVERY NPC to read all dialogue. Use the arrows to identify the spie.

Made in 14 days for Adventure Jam 2023.

Credits:
Words & Code: Gregor Müller
Pixels & GUI: Gwendolyn Yamashita
Music & Sound: Bertrand Guegan
Voice Acting: Leonie Schliesing

The inspiration for this game lies in the very real surveillance of the citizens of the GDR by the Ministerium für Staatssicherheit. If you want to know more about the real history behind this game, go here, here or here.

game.short_text: Where are you? Who are they? What is?
game.title: LUCID

details.title: LUCID
details.description:
LUCID is a Point & Click / Top-down hybrid adventure about a young kid in a very bizarre world of odd characters and even weirder happenings.
----
How to Play
WASD / Arrow keys - MoveLeft Mouse Button - InteractRight Mouse Button - Unequip
Use the cursor to highlight objects and characters, left click on them to interact. When the cursor displays a blue X, this means you're not close enough to the target and must move closer before interacting.
----
Credits
Design, Art, Sound & Code:Case Portman
Fonts:By The Butterfly - http://bythebutterfly.com

David Kerkhoff
Extra Music/SFX:Miguel Lopez - https://mlopezaudio.itch.io/metroidvania
Testing:

Emily Quinn - https://twitter.com/EmilyQ92_
LUCID was made for Adventure Jam 2023 in the timeframe of 2 weeks.Made with Gamemaker.
----
Walkthrough

(Many of these can be done in any order, this is just a rough guideline if you need a nudge in the right direction)
Speak with Roya to obtain the Midnight Snack
Give Midnight Snack to Bus and acquire Teleport Thoughts (speak with Ballook for instructions)Speak with Mr. Dreebus
Purchase Marbles from Zag (for 6 stars)Use Marbles halfway round Bell’s path (opposite the race line) 
Speak with Mr. Dreebus to acquire Fuzzlamp (Dead)Use Fuzzlamp (Dead) on Aislin to start his next quest
Purchase Battery from Zag (for 2 stars) - Combine with Fuzzlamp(Dead)Speak with Aislin with empty hand for tips on how to use Fuzzlamp
Gather Info from the Fuzz EntityFind the Large Stone and Branch - then combine
Use Mallet to play the right chimes and destroy the fuzz
Collect the Rusty Screw from the grey chime
Give Rusty Screw to Roya in exchange for Screw
With the entity destroyed, talk to Belle and have her follow you
Speak with Choggers and acquire Soap
Return Belle to her brother, Bell. Acquire Bells
Give Soap to Aislin and acquire “Legs?”
Take Bells, Screw and “Legs?” to the starting area and insert them.
Speak with Lurd.

game.short_text: A puzzle adventure game with an unusual ability!
game.title: Mannequin of Time

details.title: Mannequin of Time
details.description:
Mannequin of Time
Mannequin of Time is a puzzle adventure game, in which you use a unique ability to make your way out of a dungeon. 
Both keyboard and gamepad controls are supported!
This game was created during two weeks as a submission for Adventure Jam 2023.
If you ever get stuck, I recommend watching the embedded video to see a solution.
Warning: this game includes violence and death.

Features
Escape from the dungeon and learn about its secrets!Control a mannequin that will copy your exact movements to solve multiple puzzlesWhen you use your ability, all your actions will be recorded and then repeated by a mannequinCollect 10 notes written by a former adventurer

Synopsis
"The place you can obtain anything, even supernatural powers and immortality, as long as you clear its trials."
This is what people call the dungeon you have entered and gotten trapped in. Your goal is to escape and the dungeon is willing to help you, but something seems amiss in this unknown place.

Controls
Keyboard:
WalkWASDJumpSpaceClimbMove towards the wall. W and S for moving up/downInteractFOpen/close menuM or ESCStart/stop recording actionsRPlay recordingEContinue DialogueLeft mouse button
Gamepad:
Walk
Left stickJump
South buttonClimbMove towards the wall. Interact
East buttonOpen/close menu
Start buttonStart/stop recording actions
West buttonPlay recordingNorth buttonContinue DialogueSouth button- Controls for the menu -------RestartSouth buttonChange music volumeShoulders (bumpers)Change SFX volumeTriggers

Credits
Game, art, music and story by AccatoshFont by ingoFontsColor palette by GrafxKidSound effects created with ChipTonePathfinding by Aron Granberg
Special thanks to my fatherDownload the game or play it in the browser. If you choose to download, unzip the zip file with a file compression software, and then open the folder to find "Mannequin of Time.exe". Open this file to start the game.

A team of scientists aboard an underwater research station are suddenly confronted by an emergency. Will they manage to escape in time?

About
A classic point & click adventure game made for AdventureJam 2023. 


Language
The game can be played in English or German. There is no voiceover.


Controls
Left click to interact (or just walk) Right click to inspect Double left click on a door to leave the current room instantlyMove cursor to top of the screen to show full inventory  and access the menuThe portrait in the bottom left can be used to switch characters when available

game.short_text: An escape room game.
game.title: 9 Rooms

details.title: 9 Rooms
details.description:
CONTENT WARNING: Violence (not shown, only audio)
You wake up in a place you've never been before, with no memories of how you got there or who you are. You must escape using the items that you can find. Interact with everything and craft items into other items to solve the various puzzles and escape.
If you have questions, feel free to comment below, but try not to spoil the puzzle solutions. Thanks!
Controls
UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT - Move
ENTER - Interact/Talk
SPACE (while touching an entity) - Use Item on Entity
SPACE (while not touching entity) - Use Item/Combine Items
ENTER (during a combination) - Select Second Item to Combine
A, D - Select Item in Inventory
ESCAPE - View Controls
C - View Credits
Note: the controls and credits can only be viewed if you're not touching an entity.

game.short_text: The light has gone out. The truth remains hidden.
game.title: Dark Light (Game Jam)

details.title: Dark Light (Game Jam)
details.description:
The year is 1923, and you have been dispatched to a remote lighthouse to investigate a series of mysterious occurrences. According to reports, the lighthouse's light has been emitting a strange red glow for several days, but now it has gone completely dark.
 As you approach the lighthouse, you sense that something is amiss – the air is thick with an eerie silence that seems to hang heavily in the desolate surroundings. As you begin your investigation, you realize that the lighthouse is hiding secrets that are far more ominous than you could have ever imagined. 
 You must tap into your problem-solving skills and use your intuition to uncover the truth behind the lighthouse's malfunction and the strange happenings that have been taking place there. Each puzzle you solve and every clue you discover brings you closer to unraveling the mystery and confronting the source of the strange occurrences.
Instructions
Left mouse button click to interact with the environment.
Move cursor arrow to upper centre of screen to open inventory.
Press Q to quit game.
Created in 14 days for Adventure Jam 2023
Game Designer
Kevin Wickenden
@polytelygames (itch.io)
Sound Designer
Javier Ventosa
@ventousa (itch.io)
Art Designer
Theodora Simpson
@poltergayst (itch.io)

Uncover the secrets of a friendship between a boy and a moth. This point-and-click adventure game consists of more than 10 mini puzzles, 7 different scenes, and various dialogue choices for you to explore. Investigate the small village from a child's perspective and make friends along the way.Click around to move and interact with objects. game.short_text: 3rd Person Adventure through a Desert Border Town.
game.title: Scholar's Path

details.title: Scholar's Path
details.description:
Made for Adventure Jam 2023
You are Dr Jonah Gilroy, a Scholar in a world ravaged by a global calamity.
Tasked with discovering the cause behind an unusual planetary disturbance, Dr Gilroy has travelled to the Atruvian Sea, to begin his study into the event. Using maps and journal entries scattered throughout the world, navigate and explore the Border Town and the areas around it via foot or Light Step, a dune walking device to speed up your travels. 
Controls:
WASD for Movement.Spacebar to Jump.Shift to Sprint.E to Interact and for Next SubtitleClick to Select Player Dialogue OptionsEsc to bring up Menu & Journal
What to expect:
3rd Person Character controllera dune walker called a Light Step to speed up your travel.A story that guides you through the world with various dialogue opportunities
8 original songs/beats.4 maps to help you navigate the world.5 journal entries3 different Exits options
Contributors:
Game, Art & Animation: Lachlan Toft
Story: Harry Fritsch
Sound Design: Mitchell Toft
Made in Unity using the following published assets:
Jann Ott's - Character Movement FundamentalsPixel Crusher's - Dialogue System for UnityJean Moreno's - Toony Colors Pro 2

details.title: The Third Wish
details.description:
Sharing this game with your friends (Twitter, etc) is the #1 thing you can do to support it. Thanks!

The Third Wish is a sci-fi point & click adventure about a family and fate and consequence. Full voice acting.
--
Altair 4. A planet 17 light years from Earth, containing one Mr. and Mrs. White who run a moisture farm for an unconcerned company at the far edge of explored space.
Today is like any other in the lives of Mr. and Mrs. White but tonight they entertain a guest with a particular artifact that will test the limit of their belief in fate.
How to Play


Left MouseWalk aroundUse/Interact with item or characterRight MouseLook at/examine somethingCan do multiple times. details.title: Pixel's Time Paradox
details.description:
Story
  
When Pixel learns that author T. T. Hunter died, he’s devastated. Now he might never know how his favourite book series ends! So, he does what any inventor cat would do: he builds a time machine, to travel back to the novelist’s final hours, in hopes of preventing the tragic act.
  
But things are never that easy. In this latest addition to the Inspector Waffles universe—created in two weeks for Adventure Jam 2023—help Pixel, along with his flamingo pal JayJay, to solve time travel puzzles, avoid paradoxes, and save the day for literature fans everywhere! 
  
 
  
Controls
  
Left click to walk, interact, look at hotspots, and combine items. Right-click to examine inventory items.
  

Credits
Art: Marilou Renault-Carraro
Music/SFX: Philip Aldous
Testing/Proofreading: Will Ackermann
Code/Design/Story: Goloso Games

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.8 out of 5 stars(54 total ratings)

moreInfo.Tags: Cats, Point & Click, Story Rich, Time Travel

game.short_text: Unravel the Cosmic Tapestry!
game.title: The Fabricwalker

details.title: The Fabricwalker
details.description:
Embark on a journey through a unraveling universe in this enigmatic sidescroller. Embrace your role as the Fabricwalker, a chosen hero destined to restore balance to a crumbling universe.
 Weave through time and space, challenge the forces that threaten reality, and discover the secrets of the Cosmic Tapestry. 
Will you mend the threads of existence or succumb to the chaos?
Solo developed in a week for the Adventure Jam 2023

moreInfo.Author: Maaz
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Atmospheric, Creepy, Fantasy, Pixel Art, Short, Singleplayer

game.short_text: A Cosy 90s Fantasy Adventure
game.title: The Telwynium: Book Three

details.title: The Telwynium: Book Three
details.description:
The Telwynium: Book Three
- The Shadow of Spring -
The Summer King walks! The fellowship from Willows Dene has been split asunder, each a prisoner in grave, tomb or cell. Each faces their own peril, with only their wits to guide them against merciless brigands, the living dead, shadowfell, and the witches of Targoth. 
The Telwynium: Book Three is an early 90s style point and click, with Sierra SCI0 style graphics, but with a fancy new-fangled point 'n click interface.
Made with PowerQuest!
Dave's 2d adventure game toolkit for Unity. 

Try it out yourself!
The Third Book of The Telwynium Saga
Book One - Winter's Dawn
Book Two - The Summer King
Book Three - The Shadow of Spring

Check out our other adventures:



How To Play
When in doubt, look about! In this style of game, looking is very important, It's easy to miss things if you're not looking at everything.The walkthrough is included in a readme file if you get stuck.
Left click:With the Boot cursor to walk.
With the Gauntlet cursor to interact. (Talk, Pick-up, Use)
With the Eye cursor to Examine, and find clues to solve the puzzles.
On an inventory item to Equip it (or examine with the eye cursor)
With an inventory item to use it

Right click:To change cursor
To unequip an inventory item

C to toggle CRT camera effectsF1 for help, F2 for settingsQ, W and E keys select Walk, Use, LookAt.If you're using an *actual* CRT monitor: 'M' toggles native resolutions and F to toggles fullscreen modes.

Credits:
Dave Lloyd (@DuzzOnDrums) -  Story, Code, Art
Brandon Blume (@BrandonBlume) - Music and SFXFonts by GoatmealSome SFX hacked up from old SCI0 games
Special thanks and inspiration:
IrreverentPixel, Dan (MostlyDecentGames), 13x666, Clare Del Beato - TestingTom Lloyd - Story sounding boardBarney Cumming (@Powerhoof) - Walk Anim Template
Louis Meyer (@LouisDMeyer) - Additional Music in Book OneThe Seadads and Feeding Timers
Christy Marx & Peter Ledger
Robert Jordan & Brandon Sanderson

game.short_text: A point-n-click pixelart adventure game about writers, killings, undersea dreaming gods and time tunnels
game.title: Twisted Times in Twinsmouth

details.title: Twisted Times in Twinsmouth
details.description:
A point-n-click pixel-art adventure game about writers, killings, undersea dreaming gods, and time tunnels - done for #AdvJam2023
[Warning: Despite the comedic mood, this game contains (unrealistic) blood, death and monsters, and even talks about mental illness (caused by monsters and gods... so not exactly a common situation, but).
Where do writers get their wonderful ideas? 
Yes, like you, we KNOW they're hiding something from us - a place - a food - something that makes them LOOK smarter! 
So let's try to find out their secret SOON - after all, the story of the jam game is not going to write itself!
The Story

Who is the mysterious and powerful lord who asked E. A. Poe to come to his house a few days before he died? Is he the same person who, almost a century later, would send a similar invitation to H.P. Lovecraft?
And how do two small towns founded by twin brothers on either side of a small stream relate to all these events?
A mistake made in grief may have unleashed something that should never have come ashore.
Where are you when the game starts?

Marco and Stefania are in Pinkhouse Cove, a small seaside town in Massachusetts. Not because of its 2-star hotels or its dangerous food, but because Marco seems to be close to discovering the "Big Writers Lie" about the origin of ideas and to finally be able to create a decent game.
But things may be a little different than this great guy thinks. And much more dangerous - not only for him.
How to play
Left-click: use / interact / talk to 
Right-click: look at / move to 
To change area, click to move to the exit point, then once there, click again

You can switch between the two main characters anytime, using the two bottom-left icons

Pressing space you can see the usable hotspots (including directions)

Credits

Story, Graphics, and Animations by Marco Giorgini (@marcogiorgini)

Original Music by Andrea Baroni (@bluegestalt)
The game was built with Defold engine (http://www.defold.com)
Walkthrough

If you need some help finishing the game, you can use the Walkthrough file available for download
Source & Resources

As I said, my engine is based on Defold - in the next weeks my plan is to release the full source code of this game (but with different licenses for code and resources)

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.9 out of 5 stars(14 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: Marco Giorgini
moreInfo.Tags: 16-bit, 2D, Pixel Art, Point & Click, Story Rich

game.short_text: This show is a matter of life or death!
game.title: Saure Gurken: Audiospawn

details.title: Saure Gurken: Audiospawn
details.description:
Download build might be a slightly better graphical experience than the web build

Step into the shoes of Korea's most bizarre rock band, Saure Gurken! This time, they're battling more than just the booze in this absurd and darkly comedic adventure.
Navigate a series of increasingly bizarre obstacles to get to the gig because this show is a matter of life or death!
Featuring an all new original Saure Gurken song written and recorded during the jam for this game!

Instructions:
Left click.
Inventory is at the top of the screen if you move your mouse there.

Credits:

game.short_text: Have you ever eaten raw sweet corn?
game.title: The Enigma of Mr. X

details.title: The Enigma of Mr. X
details.description:
Emily's brother is missing, she's succumbing to various addictions, and can't seem to escape her broken home. The nightmares started about a month ago. Maybe today is the day she can turn it all around? The Enigma of Mr. X is a fully voiced character driven side-scrolling psychological horror adventure involving nightmares, missing persons, and dysfunctional relationships, featuring an immersive soundtrack, mostly meaningless choices, existential dread, a ridiculous breakfast order, raw sweet corn, a drunk dad, run-on sentences, and a sweet lil kitty cat. 

Content Warning: This game contains themes of depression, drug usage, and mental abuse. Includes adult language, disturbing audio and visuals, and representations of violence.

MoveLeft / Right a / dInteractUp / Downw / sContinueEnter /  Space / Clicke

Notes: 
-Interactions marked with ">>>" move to next scene
-Recommend headphones and desktop version for best experience
-Takes about 30-45 minutes to complete, no save system sorry

-There's  a weird bug I haven't found a fix for yet. If you press Esc while a  choice is available, you will have to use the mouse to select that  choice, the keyboard selection should work fine after. 
    


Created in two weeks for Adventure Jam 2023


Starring:
Maya Murphy as Emily
Dave McClellan as Deputy Billings
Shaun Mendum as Stranger & Junkie
Jasmin Bartlett as Alex
Arrianna Abraham as Rachel
Gale Hall as Mark & Kid
Christopher Rocco as Dad

moreInfo.Author: hankworx
moreInfo.Tags: Atmospheric, Dark, Female Protagonist, Horror, Psychological Horror, Side Scroller, Story Rich, Voice Acting
